summary: Threat Assessment Panel (6th intelligence panel) VERIFIED. Backend API /api/guardian-ai/insights/threat-assessment returns 200 with all required fields. Frontend panel visible in Command Center with threat level badge, narrative text, stats row, and recommended action. All 7 intelligence panels display correctly. Regression tests for user selection and panel updates passed.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend guardian_ai_v2.py Lines 106-196: Threat assessment endpoint correctly uses heatmap cache via get_live_heatmap(), computes threat level based on zone counts and max user risk score
Backend caching implemented correctly with 60s TTL in _threat_cache global dict
Frontend ThreatAssessment.jsx correctly displays all required elements with typing animation for narrative
GPT-5.2 integration via Emergent LLM Key with fallback template narrative working

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all panel data-testid verified, regression tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Used existing heatmap cache data and high-risk users from guardian sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center now has 7 intelligence panels (iteration 117 added Threat Assessment as 6th panel). Threat Assessment shows: threat level badge with color coding (SAFE=green, MODERATE=amber, HIGH=orange, CRITICAL=red), GPT-5.2 generated or fallback narrative text with typing animation, stats row (zones/users/incidents), recommended action, and 'Powered by Guardian AI Engine' label. Panel auto-refreshes every 90 seconds. Backend caches results for 60 seconds. All panels have data-testid attributes for testing. User selection in AI Risk Intelligence updates AI Reasoning, Digital Twin, and Timeline panels.
verified_features: Backend GET /api/guardian-ai/insights/threat-assessment returns 200 with structure: threat_level, summary, zones_escalating, users_anomaly, top_zone, recent_incidents, recommended_action, generated_at
Backend caches threat assessment results for 60 seconds (verified with same timestamp)
Backend uses heatmap cache data via get_live_heatmap() (not raw SQL)
Frontend threat-assessment-panel visible in Command Center map overlay (top-right)
Frontend threat-level-badge shows threat level (HIGH) with color coding
Frontend threat-narrative displays GPT-generated or fallback template text
Frontend stats row shows zones (47), users (1), incidents (0) counts
Frontend threat-recommendation shows recommended action text
Frontend 'Powered by Guardian AI Engine' label present on panel
All 7 intelligence panels visible simultaneously on Command Center
Regression: AI Risk Intelligence click-to-select working
Regression: AI Reasoning panel updates on user selection
Regression: Digital Twin shows behavioral profile updates
Regression: AI Timeline shows risk events for selected user
